formulas.name: 1. Electric Field due to a Point Charge
formulas.variables: E - Electric field, k - Coulomb's constant, q - Charge, r - Distance from the charge
formulas.notes: This formula applies when the charge is stationary.

formulas.name: 2. Electric Potential due to a Point Charge
formulas.variables: V - Electric potential, k - Coulomb's constant, q - Charge, r - Distance from the charge
formulas.notes: This formula applies when the charge is stationary.

formulas.name: 3. Force on a Charge in an Electric Field
formulas.variables: F - Force, q - Charge, E - Electric field
formulas.notes: This formula applies when the charge is stationary or moving.

formulas.name: 4. Magnetic Field due to a Straight Wire
formulas.variables: B - Magnetic field, μ0 - Permeability of free space, I - Current, r - Distance from the wire
formulas.notes: This formula applies when the wire is long compared to the distance from the wire.

formulas.name: 5. Magnetic Field due to a Circular Loop
formulas.variables: B - Magnetic field, μ0 - Permeability of free space, I - Current, r - Radius of the loop
formulas.notes: This formula applies when the loop is small compared to the distance from the loop.

formulas.name: 6. Lorentz Force
formulas.variables: F - Force, q - Charge, E - Electric field, v - Velocity of the charge, B - Magnetic field
formulas.notes: This formula applies when the charge is moving in an electric and magnetic field.

formulas.name: 7. Biot-Savart Law
formulas.variables: dB - Incremental magnetic field, μ0 - Permeability of free space, I - Current, dl - Incremental length of the wire, r - Distance from the wire, θ - Angle between the wire and the position vector
formulas.notes: This formula applies when the wire is short compared to the distance from the wire.
